  "sinks": "The main sink is the 'src' attribute of the 'img' element, which loads the avatar image URL generated by the code.",
  "flows": "Email or hash is processed through 'hashEmail' (using md5), then passed to 'avatarUrl' to construct the URL, which is then assigned to the 'img' element's src attribute.",

No obfuscated or malicious code detected. The external URLs used (ui-avatars.com and gravatar.com) are legitimate services for avatars.",

The functions utilize known libraries (lodash, md5, React, PropTypes) and generate URLs for avatar images. No suspicious network activity or malicious behavior such as data exfiltration, reverse shells, or system damage code is present. The URL parameters are constructed from user-provided data but are used solely to fetch avatar images. The code does not perform any file or system modification, or data transmission beyond image URL generation. The use of external services is common for avatar rendering and does not indicate malicious intent.",
